ddls:
CREATE TABLE "streets" (
  "street_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each street */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street */,
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subdivision the street belongs to */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the street in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the street in meters */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., asphalt, concrete) */,
  "traffic_volume" TEXT /* Average daily traffic volume */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the street record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the street record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the street record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the street record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("street_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streets_subdivision_id FOREIGN KEY ("subdivision_id") REFERENCES subdivisions ("subdivision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdivisions" (
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subdivision */,
  "subdivision_name" TEXT /* Name of the subdivision */,
  "county_map" TEXT /* Mapping reference for the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the subdivision in square meters */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Number of residents in the subdivision */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Type of zoning (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the subdivision */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the subdivision record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the subdivision record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the subdivision record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the subdivision record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the subdivision record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdivision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_maps" (
  "county_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the county map */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the map (e.g., 1:10000) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the map */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the map record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the map record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the map record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the map record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the map record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "map_reference" INTEGER /* Reference to the mapping associated with the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the station record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the station record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the station record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the station record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mapping_data" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "street_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the street involved in the mapping data */,
  "county_map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county map associated with the street */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station related to the street's mapping */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mapping data */,
  "map_file" TEXT /* Path to the map file or URL */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the mapping data was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the mapping data record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping data record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the mapping data record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_data_street_id FOREIGN KEY ("street_id") REFERENCES streets ("street_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_data_county_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_map_id") REFERENCES county_maps ("county_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, engineer, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mapping_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mapping data being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the mapping data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update for this version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_versions_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES mapping_data ("mapping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the department record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the department record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the department record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_logs" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department managing the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., planning, in progress, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the project record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_logs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_mappings" (
  "project_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project mapping record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the mapping */,
  "street_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the street involved in the project */,
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subdivision involved in the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project mapping */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project mapping record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project mapping record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the project mapping record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_mappings_street_id FOREIGN KEY ("street_id") REFERENCES streets ("street_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_mappings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_logs ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_mappings_subdivision_id FOREIGN KEY ("subdivision_id") REFERENCES subdivisions ("subdivision_id")
)
